zh.Powys Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾卡素
zh.lifeSummary: Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole是Gwenwynwyn op Owain Cyferliogt和Margaret Marared verch Rhys II的兒子，於1198年出生。他於1242年與Hawise le Strange在英國威爾斯波斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1286年享年88歲。

zh-hans.Powys Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole是Gwenwynwyn op Owain Cyferliogt和Margaret Marared verch Rhys II的儿子，于1198年出生。他于1242年与Hawise le Strange在英国威尔斯波斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1286年享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .
Americanized form of German   Pohle   or   Pohl  .

variants.name: Poles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Livio, Primo, Santo.
English and Welsh: variant of Pole and Powell + genitival or excrescent -s.
Italian (Friuli and Veneto): probably a derivative of the personal name   Polo  . It is also found in Slovenia.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Prince
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the royal title, Old French prince (Latin princeps). The name is popular among Blacks in Britain and the United States, influenced perhaps by the fame of the American singer Prince ( b. 1958 as Prince Rogers Nelson ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Lower
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word (from Old French;  compare  Fleur  ), which is also sometimes used as a term of endearment.

nameMeanings.name: Powys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Powis
meanings: Welsh (now mainly West Midlands of England): habitational name from the region of Powis in mid Wales (from Old Welsh powes ‘country dwellers’).

en.lifeSummary: Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole was born in 1198 as the son of Gwenwynwyn op Owain Cyferliogt and Margaret Marared verch Rhys II. He married Hawise le Strange in 1242, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1286, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole est né en 1198, fils de Gwenwynwyn op Owain Cyferliogt et Margaret Marared verch Rhys II. Il a épousé Hawise le Strange en 1242, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1286, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole wurde 1198, als Sohn von Gwenwynwyn op Owain Cyferliogt und Margaret Marared verch Rhys II geboren. Er hat 1242 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom Hawise le Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1286 im Alter von 88 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole è nato il nel 1198 come figlio di Gwenwynwyn op Owain Cyferliogt e Margaret Marared verch Rhys II. Lui sposato Hawise le Strange nel 1242, nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1286, all'età di 88 anni.

ru.lifeSummary: Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole родился в 1198 г. Его родителей звали Gwenwynwyn op Owain Cyferliogt и Margaret Marared verch Rhys II. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise le Strange в 1242 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1286 г. в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Gruffyddap Gwenwynwyn Prince of Lower Powys Pole nació en 1198 como hijo de Gwenwynwyn op Owain Cyferliogt y Margaret Marared verch Rhys II. Se casó con Hawise le Strange en 1242, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1286, a la edad de 88 años.
